caption: The video appears to be a news segment from News18 India, focusing on political developments in 2024. The central figure is a woman speaking into a microphone, likely addressing an audience or giving a speech. She is dressed in traditional attire, wearing glasses and a shawl. The background shows a group of people, possibly security personnel, standing behind her. The text on the screen discusses potential alliances between political parties, specifically mentioning JDU (Janata Dal United) and other political figures such as Nitish Kumar, Santosh Suman, and Sumit Kumar. The lower third of the screen provides additional context, indicating that Dr. Prem Kumar has become a minister in Nitish's government after leaving BJP. The overall tone suggests a discussion on political strategies and alliances leading up to the 2024 elections.
